I was about to be captured by that woman: I was about to be captured by that woman with purple hair, but Tesla saved me at the last moment... Now it's up to me to make my way to Gearen Laboratory and hopefully get a Pokémon myself so that I can travel the region safely.
Team Xen attacked Goldenwood Forest, but: Team Xen attacked Goldenwood Forest, but Melia and I escaped... Unfortunately, we ran into another Xen member at the Lab. Melia managed to escape, but now she's on the run. It's up to me, Ren, and Venam to see if we can intercept all of this and save her.
Find the Rock in Amethyst Cave!: Find the Rock in Amethyst Cave!
Aelita and I were preparing to head out: Aelita and I were preparing to head out to Akuwa Town together. It's nice knowing that I won't be alone, but...  It looks like something's come up. Team Xen may be attacking East Gearen again. I have to go and help.
Take the train to East Gearen!: Take the train to East Gearen!
Reach the end of the Courtyard!: Reach the end of the Courtyard!
Enter the manor through the window.
Meet up with Aelita and Venam.
I was able to defeat Marianette, but it: I was able to defeat Marianette, but it came with a price... She sacrificed herself to save us. The door to her world is closed and there's no way back. Now, there's nothing left but for Aelita and I to move onto Goldenleaf Town as planned. Marianette... I hope you're okay.
Find a way to open the gate.
Speak with Narcissa at her home.
Reach the end of the lab!: Reach the end of the lab!
Goldenleaf Town was... Interesting! Lots: Goldenleaf Town was... Interesting! Lots of very normal people. We helped Narcissa turn her town around, and now it's finally time to head to Akuwa Town. We need to pass through Wispy Ruins and Route 4. Then, we'll make it to our destination. Finally!
Find someone to clear the way.
Take a tour of the castle with Saki.
Find out more about this mystery girl.
Pick up a Mining Kit at the shop.
Talk to the boy in the courtyard.
Blow up the rock Adam mined through!: Blow up the rock Adam mined through!
See what's going on in the mines!.
Look for the purple books in the library: Look for the purple books in the library.
Uncover the mystery at the Garden.
Head to the bow of the ship.
After everything we've been through, I t: After everything we've been through, I thought things were finally turning around. But I guess not... Nim is missing and she's been feeling sick. I have a bad feeling about this. A very bad feeling... Mom, I hope I'll do you proud.
Return to Kakori via Cable Car.
Take a boat to Helojak Island.
Chapter 7 | A Teila Fire and Ice: Chapter 7 | A Teila Fire and Ice
Now that the Sky Relic is ours, it's up: Now that the Sky Relic is ours, it's up to us to find the remaining two... All of this happened so suddenly. We finally felt like we were in times of peace, but I shouldve known that was short lived. On to the rest of Terajuma.
Angie has been defeated... Temporarily. All that work and we didn't even defeat her for good. She was too strong. We need the last remaining Relic to be able to enter Valor Mountain. Just what other hell shall we endure to save the ones we love?
Chapter 9 | No Time Left To Lose!: Chapter 9 | No Time Left To Lose!
Team Xen was successfully defeated. We o: Team Xen was successfully defeated. We only lost Nim, the Professor, and Aelita to do it... I feel pretty lost right now. Where do I go from here? I don't think anyone knows the answer. We just have to find the strength to move on.
Find the source of the screams!: Find the source of the screams!
After hearing about the strange phenomen: After hearing about the strange phenomenon leaving people encased in stone, we decided to head to Grand Dream City to investigate further. The stone phenomenon sounds similar to Nim's case. So I'm interested in investigating this further. I feel it's only right.
Pick up the strange phone call.
Go to the back of the train!: Go to the back of the train!
After that debacle with the Grand Expres: After that debacle with the Grand Express, we're finally here in the big city! We're here to investigate the weird phenomenon, but first things first—it's time to become accustomed to this city's layout and make sure I know it like the back of my hand. Team Xen won't win this one!
Defeat those who threaten the city!: Defeat those who threaten the city!
As if things couldn't get any worse, Ven: As if things couldn't get any worse, Venam was turned to stone... On the bright side, I reunited with Aelita and we're going to work together again to heal Venam and everyone else affected. Aelita knows a healer that may be able to help. We're going to get to know him and see what we can do. I won't stop until we're successful.
Use the key on the door.
Genuinely, what can I even say? Melia an: Genuinely, what can I even say? Melia and I went through some messed up things, but now we're back and ready to roll. It's time to figure out just what's going in with GDC and all these weird phenomena. Nim is alive, but she sounds different... Let's hope we can reach her.
Find a way in Rejuv Co.
Chapter 14 | Death of One, Birth of Anot: Chapter 14 | Death of One, Birth of Another
Bladestar attacked the Grand Dream Ball... There are thought to be no survivors at the present time. I don't know what my next plan is, but Bladestar must be stopped at all costs.
Team Bladestar has been dealt with, and: Team Bladestar has been dealt with, and the Spring of Rejuvenation has revitalized everyone who was turned to stone! Finally a moment of happiness after all that's happened. However, we've been summoned to Sashila by Alexandra... I wonder what's she's got to tell.
Find the rest of the group.
Find the key to the main hall!: Find the key to the main hall!
Search the building for an exit.
Make your way out of Third HQ!: Make your way out of Third HQ!
The Puppet Master has enrolled us into h: The Puppet Master has enrolled us into his School of Nightmares. Our goal is to uncover several truths, but I highly doubt things will be that easy...
Find the password to the door.
R U N, L A V E N D E R.
We were sent an ominous video from Clear: We were sent an ominous video from Clear and Kieran to meet at the Grand Dream Stadium.They're holding Mosely and Ren's mom Regina captive. Not only that, but Cassandra seems to have escaped her cell...Why does it always go wrong before we make a move? We have to settle this quickly.
Find a way into the depths: Find a way into the depths
This is it. I've prepared for this momen: This is it. I've prepared for this moment. The Xenpurgis has been summoned and it's up to everyone to take this thing down. It's supposed to be unbeatable, but in this moment I'm not so sure. Let's do this.
This is it. All of our training and time:
This is it. All of our training and time fighting back against Team Xen has culminated to this. Team Xen must be destroyed. Madame X must fall.
    And after that...
There's just about a month until the gro: There's just about a month until the group invades Team Xen's HQ. All three components have been acquired and the time to awaken Adrest is here.
Adrest has disappeared and this time for: Adrest has disappeared and this time for good. However, before he vanished, he secretly left behind encrypted data files for the group to decrypt.
Insert mail into the hidden mailbox.
Train to C. Square then to S. Mall.
Meet up with Tesla and Amber!: Meet up with Tesla and Amber!
Check in on Venam and Tesla.
Enjoy the rest of the party.
Speak with M2 when you're ready.
Talk to M2 when you're ready.
What the...? This gross old man just cur: What the...? This gross old man just cursed me. Now I feel... different? But almost familiar. Time to give this man a piece of my mind!
This old man's granddaughter didn't retu: This old man's granddaughter didn't return with him to the station! Look for his granddaughter in Goldenwood Forest.
Daria's boyfriend went into Amethyst Cav: Daria's boyfriend went into Amethyst Cave to look for growing tea leaves but never returned... Guess it's up to me to solve this lady's love problems. To Amethyst Cave I go.
This man seems to really want to hear th: This man seems to really want to hear the bell's sound located in these woods. I'm already exploring so I may as well see if there's something I can do!
Ring the Bell in the woods!: Ring the Bell in the woods!
Search for the Bell's missing part.
The Hiker left the RV unattended...
These scientists are trying to dig into: These scientists are trying to dig into Carotos Mountain because they believe there's some untapped energy located deep below. Am I doing the right thing here? Aelita might be mad at me if I let these people dig into the mountain. Maybe I'll 'forget' to tell her about this one... Sorry, Aelita!
Amber's being held in the Depths of Valo: Amber's being held in the Depths of Valor Mountain. I can't get to her until the 'mood' of the mountain is 'subdued'. Maybe when Valor is calm? In any case, I have to remember to save Amber before I reach the top.
Reach the depths of Valor Mountain!: Reach the depths of Valor Mountain!
Guess I've signed up for some virtul lea: Guess I've signed up for some virtul league competition. I don't think it's official, but it could be a fun way to practice. All I have to do is get all eight badges? I mean, that should be easy. Right?
Looks like some hooligans took this poor: Looks like some hooligans took this poor girl's Starly. I'm gonna rough 'em up and make sure they don't steal anything ever again!
Sasha's mom is missing. She seems really: Sasha's mom is missing. She seems really scared and I know how she's feeling right now. So I'm going to help her find her mom. Maybe that means I'll find mine someday soon too.
yo just go in the building: yo just go in the building
Some strange backpacker wants me to visi: Some strange backpacker wants me to visit and ask questions from three people. The receptionist at the Chrisola Hotel, Karrina the Gang Leader, and a history teacher behind the lab. Let's get askin'!
Nothing of consequence. Guy doesn't have: Nothing of consequence. Guy doesn't have a name.
The client is on route to move to Teraju: The client is on route to move to Terajuma, but there are some rough patches he wants to smooth out before he leaves...
A promising career with the post office.
Apparently a group of rogue Pokemon have: Apparently a group of rogue Pokemon have been spotted at Oceana Pier. Take care of them!
Seriously, just go to the pier.
Live action performance of the Lion King: Live action performance of the Lion King
A sprouting prodigy is looking for a bat: A sprouting prodigy is looking for a battle, so that sounds like a good task for me! I can meet her at the Chrisola Hotel rooftop. I better not be late!
Someone is causing a ton of havoc at the: Someone is causing a ton of havoc at the Chrisola Hotel with their loud music! Find the culprit and please just make them stop!
The Hidden Library's general location ha: The Hidden Library's general location has been found! Meet with Henry right outside of Sheridan's Help Center for more info.
Visit the fountain in Gearen Park.
So some guy stole some cargo from a ship: So some guy stole some cargo from a ship and is attempting to get away via Oceana Pier. You should check all the warehouses. They always looked fishy to me...
Get to the back of the warehouse!: Get to the back of the warehouse!
This trainer named Gracie wants to trade: This trainer named Gracie wants to trade for an Aipom. Aipom can primarily be found on Route 2, apparently. Why can't she just do it herself though? Oh well, I guess I can run a quick errand!
There's a Kecleon shop on Route 2. Some: There's a Kecleon shop on Route 2. Some guy wants you to steal an item from it. The item is weirdly colored, so you'll spot it right away. He wants you to get it through any means necessary. Although I heard Kecleon are quite fierce.
Bring the item to the client.
Some prodigy trainer would like to battl: Some prodigy trainer would like to battle you! She's located in front of Cherry Blossom Inn!
Looks like Novae's at it again! I always: Looks like Novae's at it again! I always enjoy battling her. Let's see what happens this time.
A little girl stuck in Jynnobi wants to: A little girl stuck in Jynnobi wants to bring her mother a souvenir from Terajuma. Search Terajuma Beach for an appropriate souvenir.
Find a souvenir for Trisha's mother.
Return to Trisha with the souvenir!: Return to Trisha with the souvenir!
A panicked woman warned you to not go ou: A panicked woman warned you to not go outside at night in Kakori Village on particularly sweltering nights.
Search for the monster in Kakori.
Report back to the panicked woman!: Report back to the panicked woman!
An engineer's Pokémon workers aren't coo: An engineer's Pokémon workers aren't cooperating with him anymore. But they're necessary to help fix the bridge to Tyluric Temple... Time to talk some sense into them!
Getting reports of a suspicious individu: Getting reports of a suspicious individual on Helojak Island... How the heck did anyone get there? The waters there are way too strong for normal people. Oh well, better go check it out for Crawli!
Talon, Flora, and Florin are exploring t: Talon, Flora, and Florin are exploring the Tyluric Temple! Explore the depths of the temples and uncover the secrets within!
The workers at the Terajuma Excavation S: The workers at the Terajuma Excavation Site have been researching the mysterious origins of the Black Shards. Help the workers go through various trials to finalize some data.
Some old lady lost her darling Furfrou w: Some old lady lost her darling Furfrou while visiting Goldenwood Forest. Take a look around and see if you can find it!
Shane the Fisherman has been having trou: Shane the Fisherman has been having trouble catching a certain fish in the lake at Goldenwood Forest. But fear not! If we can get him three Black Apricorns, he may be able to make a lure strong enough to finally catch it!
Bring the three Apricorns back to Shane.
Maman is looking for 'Lost Souls' to hou: Maman is looking for 'Lost Souls' to house in her garden... I think she means lost children. Why does she know there are 11 lost children? That's kinda strange... Mosely trusts her, though, and she seems to be very kind. Searching the entire island blind is pointless. I'll have to ask Maman for guidance.
Karen would like your help in exploring: Karen would like your help in exploring more of The Hidden Library. Meet up with Karen and pray nothing will go wrong.
Meet up Karrina in the East Wing.
Find the key to the West wing.
Beat Karen at her own game!: Beat Karen at her own game!
Follow Karrina to the pressure plates.
There's an apparent 'inconsistency' loca: There's an apparent 'inconsistency' located somewhere in the Xen Lab underneath Wispy Tower. Eizen gave you a key to investigate the place further.
Particia wants you to place an envelope: Particia wants you to place an envelope inside of the mailbox by the lift. Easy, right?
Place the letter in the mailbox.
Mimi has been the victim of a prank by h: Mimi has been the victim of a prank by her ex-boyfriend. If you find her ex and 'teach him a lesson', Mimi may be willing to part with her Train Pass.
Search for Darchlight Gems scattered acr: Search for Darchlight Gems scattered across the Garufa Sanctuary and uncover Vivian's past.
A mystery man has appeared and broke thr: A mystery man has appeared and broke through the Xen Blockade! But it looks like he's in trouble. Climb up and help him!
You have been tasked with protecting the: You have been tasked with protecting the Princess Odessa. Don't screw this up or things may go horribly wrong for you.
One resident of Kristiline Town is looki: One resident of Kristiline Town is looking for a contestant to compete in Kristiline's very first quiz show! Do you have what it takes to win?
Huh, I forgot the lighthouses were even: Huh, I forgot the lighthouses were even a problem. I guess I'll use my strength to help Alex and Sam get them back up and running. They're important for everyone!
Dartreaux's son, Rowlet, has ran off to: Dartreaux's son, Rowlet, has ran off to the Tyluric Temple in a rebellious outburst. Bring Rowlet home.
Dr. Jenkel unfortunately notified you th: Dr. Jenkel unfortunately notified you that there have been 7 casualties during the attack on Terajuma Island. Strangely, however, all 7 casualties have seemed to have gone missing. What's going on here?
There have been a recent influx of peopl: There have been a recent influx of people going missing. While the majority are children, there have been reports of adults going missing as well. Most notably, Rune.
Say the phrase to the man!: Say the phrase to the man!
Ring the bell at the top!: Ring the bell at the top!
Make sure Ana isn't taked advantage of...
Talk to people about the Cook Off!: Talk to people about the Cook Off!
There's been a weird phenomenon that's i: There's been a weird phenomenon that's interfering with our institute's weather system.
Report back to the W.I. President.
Arturo wants something to hang on his wa: Arturo wants something to hang on his walls so that it feels fuller. Explore GDC and find a suitable piece for him.
Adrienn is working with the people behin: Adrienn is working with the people behind the S.S. Oceana to recover the wreckage. They need someone to plant floatation devices... I guess I'm the one who has to do it. I guess no one else should.
I found this sad little box that was lef: I found this sad little box that was left abandoned on Flora's bookshelf. Maybe I should figure out how to open it - she won't be missing it anytime soon, right?
Find the source of the box!: Find the source of the box!
This guy at the Fishing Guild is holding: This guy at the Fishing Guild is holding out on me. Guess I gotta wait till later, huh? That's fine, I'm in no rush.
Hazuki and I are trying to gather these: Hazuki and I are trying to gather these kids that have snuck into Celgearn Castle. I feel weird about being here with Hazuki, after everything, but she's different. She almost reminds me of Saki. That's comforting, somehow... I think?
Jan, Zumi, and Adrienn from the Reborn R: Jan, Zumi, and Adrienn from the Reborn Region banded together to fix up East Gearen City. The city is different now. I'm not exactly sure how I feel, but the place feels bustling again. I guess I'll see how I can help around.
The Pokeball Factory down in West Gearen: The Pokeball Factory down in West Gearen is experiencing weird shortages. I'm heading over there to check on why that is. Why am I, a random trainer, in charge of this? Don't they have systems in place to figure out their own problems? Guess not.
Jan wants to restore Goldenwood Forest t: Jan wants to restore Goldenwood Forest to its former glory. Team Xen is responsible for destroying that beautiful forest. Tesla said it was her favorite place in the region. I think I'll help out the forest for the people of Aevium... But mostly for Tesla.
A woman called Zumi has asked me to find: A woman called Zumi has asked me to find some rare Pokémon across Aevium in order to help her further develop the Pokédex. Sounds like a pain, but she said there'd be good rewards, so... Eh, why not?
Find the Pokémon in Axis Factory!: Find the Pokémon in Axis Factory!
There have been 'weird readings' around: There have been 'weird readings' around the region. Goldenwood Forest, Magrodar Crater, and Route 11. I'm interested in what these readings could be. I should check them out ASAP.
The caretaker of the home of Saki Blakeo: The caretaker of the home of Saki Blakeory, Erina, needs someone to look after the house while she's out for some errands. The pay looks to be REALLY good for what seems to be just sitting around doing nothing. No way anything can go wrong here! ...Right?
Check the list for what you can do.
Find a way to deactivate Sakitron!: Find a way to deactivate Sakitron!
It looks like there's some weird phenome: It looks like there's some weird phenomenon going on at West Gearen's power plant, and they're looking for a competent trainer to help out. It's urgent, so time to get into action!
Investigate where the noise came from.
Isha has fled into the Atebit Kingdom! I: Isha has fled into the Atebit Kingdom! If we're not careful, he's gonna escape with his crimes going unpunished. We have to find him before he gets away!
Whoops. I accidentally set a demon? Ghos: Whoops. I accidentally set a demon? Ghost??? SOMETHING that calls itself Dufaux loose. Narcissa has sprung into action to deal with the matter... I should probably assist in cleaning up the mess I've caused.
Find a way to change the cave.
Find a way out of the attic.
Someone's asked for an information trade: Someone's asked for an information trade about Team Xen's Dimensional Rifts. The request was specifically aimed at me, but I don't know who the client is... Maybe it's worth checking out?
Find a way to help Anabel.
Meet up with Looker and Anabel.
A researcher named Marten is interested: A researcher named Marten is interested in the Voidal Chasm and its mysteries. He needs help from someone who's interested in doing some investigation, so who's better suited than someone who's already been there before?
Try and find a lost item!: Try and find a lost item!
Visit Marten at the Research Center.
Some annoying bandits are holed up in Fo: Some annoying bandits are holed up in Fort Rystrine and are mugging anyone who enters the place thanks to a Vileplume that puts you to sleep. It's a pain in the ass to the villagers, but especially Damien- so let's get rid of the problem.
Someone's sister has dropped down into t: Someone's sister has dropped down into the Voidal Chasm! If there's any place that's dangerous to get lost in it's there, so I need to act quickly. Let's reunite this kid with their sibling.
Someone's asked for a battle. Somehow, t: Someone's asked for a battle. Somehow, this request feels a little familiar... Could it be her after all this time?
A lady named Witch, one of the Gearen La: A lady named Witch, one of the Gearen Laboratory employees, is looking to rent out one of the two available spaces at Everglade Mall. Aya's enlisted my help to see that settling the matter goes smoothly! Though really, why am I doing this? I'm not the one running the city...
Pick up the Oran Berry order.
Report to the officer in the lobby!: Report to the officer in the lobby!
Volta is hosting a small free for all to: Volta is hosting a small free for all tournament to decide who the strongest Trainer of the High Rise is... There are six Trainers I have to find and battle. I'll be the strongest!
...What in the world. A kingdom ran enti: ...What in the world. A kingdom ran entirely by Pokémon of the Goomy line was hidden in Honec Woods this whole time! Their princess, Goomelda, has asked us to train a Goomy called Goomink to become a hero to defend the kingdom from Team Anti-Assist. Will he become strong enough before we're too late?!
Join Goomink on his Gym journey!: Join Goomink on his Gym journey!
Return to the Kingdom of Goomidra!: Return to the Kingdom of Goomidra!
Talk to the King and Queen.
Even after all this time, the Parks and: Even after all this time, the Parks and Rec. Center still haven't responded. SIGH. It's always like this. Alright, let's see what's going on here.
Meet in front of the Parks Center: Meet in front of the Parks Center
An Aevian Jangmo-o seems to have escaped: An Aevian Jangmo-o seems to have escaped Poilethal Forest... Now this guard is telling me that it may have ran off to some 'tent' in the desert. Oh brother... I'm about to get financially abused, aren't I?
I have to find 6 'Rampaging Giants' and: I have to find 6 'Rampaging Giants' and retrieve their hearts. Once that's done I have to bring them back here and place them in the door adjacent to this one... This probably won't be easy.
The hidden Admin within Team Xen speaks: The hidden Admin within Team Xen speaks to us beyond the grave? Percival has given me the code '8941 9874 3461.' to enter his vault in Mt. Ruin. Just what awaits me there?
